title: Construction Party Multicolor Paper Luncheon Napkins (16cm) Pack of 16 - Vibrant and Fun Tableware for Kids' Celebrations, 13" x 13"
features: BOLD & COLORFUL: Get ready to celebrate with our eye-catching construction party luncheon napkins, featuring a vibrant multicolor design that adds excitement to any kids' party or celebration.
HIGH-QUALITY PAPER MATERIAL: Made from durable and reliable multicolor paper, our 16cm x 16cm luncheon napkins ensure a mess-free dining experience through every bite, wipe, and spill.
PACK OF 16: Each pack contains a total of 16 napkins, providing enough coverage for all attendees at your child's construction-themed party, without the hassle of frequent restocking.
PERFECTLY SIZED: Measuring at 16cm x 16cm, our luncheon napkins are thoughtfully designed to provide adequate coverage for all your tableware needs, without being too bulky or cumbersome to manage.

TRANSFOR YOUR KIDS' CELEBRATION: Elevate the atmosphere of any youngsters' gathering with our fun and vibrant construction party multicolor paper luncheon napkins, encouraging imaginations to soar while keeping the party area tidy.
description: From the manufacturer Pumpkin Orange Midnight Black Powder Blue Ruby Red Construction Birthday Add-On Items Hard hats at the ready! Build an amazing Birthday party around these designs, perfect for the little construction worker in your life! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Construction Party isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
